preconditions.requirement: Every project-scoped packet call includes root
If a required packet returns ok:false, halt and report the packet error

packetFlow.instruction: Resolve the project root with `cadre_project` using `action: "root"`.
Call `cadre_workflow` with `workflow: "archive"` and the resolved root. Pass `trackId`, cutoff, or scope arguments as structured JSON fields only.
Present the dry-run `tracks` list, packet warnings, cleanup scope, and any review_bundle manifest/path list without inlining large artifact contents into model context.
To archive reviewed work, call `cadre_workflow` again with `workflow: "archive"`, `execute: true`, and `approvalComplete: true`.
Summarize archived track ids, packet warnings, changed canonical JSON/JSONL artifacts, generated human projections, and any packet errors.

forbiddenActions: Do not recreate Cadre control-plane, native event/message state, index, worktree, provider, merge, or cleanup state with shell commands
Do not read or write Markdown projections as canonical state
Do not use Markdown payload fields, legacy Markdown import, or prompt-side state repair
